purpose: Trothix is a deterministic legal decision system. Every conclusion is the result of evaluating explicit decision tables over structured legal facts. No legal knowledge exists in executable code.
constraints: RULE_0001: No engine may contain legal knowledge.
RULE_0002: Every engine is only an evaluator.
RULE_0003: All legal knowledge lives inside knowledge/.
RULE_0004: Adding support for a new legal concept must never require modifying engine code.
RULE_0005: The engine changes rarely. The knowledge changes continuously.
RULE_0006: Every legal decision must be explainable.
RULE_0007: Every finding must trace back to a decision.
RULE_0008: Every score must derive from findings.
RULE_0009: Nothing in the deterministic engine may depend on an LLM.
RULE_0010: No feature enters production unless it improves a verified capability.
